output.compositionNotes: Overall composition matches the Figma reference. Dark mode section has correct charcoal background with rounded corners, 3-column card grid, neon-green taxonomy pills, white headings, and tertiary VIEW RESOURCE links with arrows. Light mode sections show correct off-white page background with cards blending seamlessly.

revisionVerification.summary: All three revision changes verified successfully.

changes.description: Resource/policy card backgrounds changed from bg-white to bg-off-white in light mode
changes.evidence: Light mode resource cards (screenshot archive-light-resource-detail) show cards with off-white background that blends seamlessly with the page background. Cards are defined by their subtle charcoal/10 border rather than a contrasting white fill. Same for policy cards (screenshot archive-light-policy-detail). Both card-resource.php (line 15) and card-policy.php (line 13) confirmed using bg-off-white.

changes.description: Filter pill buttons and Clear All buttons now have cursor-pointer
changes.evidence: Archive.php confirmed: cursor-pointer on form-level Clear All (line 279), active-filters Clear All (line 301), and filter pill buttons (line 310). Archive.js also updated for dynamically created pills. Cannot visually verify cursor state in static screenshots, but code changes are correctly applied in all locations.

changes.description: Load More button in light mode has explicit gradient hover background
changes.evidence: Archive.css lines 111-115 add .archive:not(.dark) .archive-load-more .btn-secondary:hover with linear-gradient(90deg, neon-green 0%, blue 70%), charcoal border, and charcoal text. Cannot visually verify hover state on current test page because no light mode section has enough items to trigger the Load More button. The CSS rule is correctly scoped and will activate when applicable.

regressionCheck.darkMode: PASS - No regressions. Dark mode resource and policy sections match Figma reference (811:59920/811:59921). Charcoal card backgrounds, off-white borders, neon-green taxonomy pills, white headings, and VIEW RESOURCE tertiary links all render correctly. Dark mode Load More button (blog xl) still has white fill with charcoal text.
regressionCheck.lightMode: PASS - Light mode resource and policy cards now use off-white backgrounds as requested. Cards blend with the page background and are defined by their subtle border-charcoal/10 border. Hover states (group-hover:bg-accent) unchanged.
regressionCheck.blogLayout: PASS - Blog post archive sections (dark mode) maintain correct 3-column card grid with alternating image/text layout. Featured first card spans correctly.
regressionCheck.filterControls: PASS - Filter dropdowns, search fields, SHOW/PER PAGE controls all render correctly in both modes.
regressionCheck.teamMemberCards: PASS - Team member archive with image cards renders correctly.
regressionCheck.testimonialCards: PASS - Testimonial archive section renders correctly.

1440w.chromium: PASS - Full page captured. All sections render correctly. Dark/light mode alternation, card grids, typography, spacing all match.
1440w.firefox: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.
1440w.webkit: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.

1024w.chromium: PASS - Full page captured. Responsive layout adjusts correctly. Cards reflow to 2-column grids where appropriate.
1024w.firefox: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.
1024w.webkit: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.

768w.chromium: PASS - Full page captured. Tablet layout correct. Card grid adjusts to narrower widths.
768w.firefox: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.
768w.webkit: PASS - Full page captured. Consistent with chromium.

375w.chromium: PASS - Full page captured. Mobile layout single-column. Filter dropdowns stack vertically. Cards display in single column.
375w.firefox: PASS - Viewport-only capture (page too tall for full-page). Top of page matches chromium rendering.
375w.webkit: PASS - Viewport-only capture (page too tall for full-page). Top of page matches chromium rendering.

detailedChecks.observation: Charcoal background with rounded corners matches Figma. Background pseudo-element covers full section area.
Cards have charcoal background with subtle off-white border. Matches Figma reference.
Cards now use off-white (#FBF6E2) background, blending seamlessly with the page. Card edges defined by charcoal/10 border. This is the intended result per user feedback.
Neon-green accent-lighter background with accent-light border. Visible in both dark and light mode cards.
Large Anton heading in white (dark mode) or charcoal (light mode). Size and weight match Figma.
Bold heading text in white (dark) or charcoal (light). Proper size hierarchy.
3-column grid for resource/policy cards. Cards have equal height with CTA anchored to bottom via mt-auto.
Filter dropdowns left-aligned, SHOW/PER PAGE right-aligned. Matches Figma layout.
Consistent vertical padding between sections. Cards have p-6 internal padding.
Cards use rounded-3xl (24px radius). Matches Figma rounded treatment.

screenshots.notes: Firefox and webkit 375w are viewport-only captures (not full-page) due to page height exceeding browser limits. All other captures are full-page.

notes.description: Light mode Load More hover gradient cannot be visually verified on the current test page because no light mode archive section has enough items to render the Load More button. The CSS rule is confirmed in code (Archive.css lines 111-115) and correctly scoped.

Cursor-pointer changes on filter pills and Clear All buttons cannot be visually verified in static screenshots. Code changes confirmed in all three PHP locations (Archive.php lines 279, 301, 310) and Archive.js buildButtons() function.

Firefox and webkit 375w captures are viewport-only (not full-page) due to the test page being extremely long at mobile width. The visible top portion renders consistently with chromium. Full-page captures succeed at 768w, 1024w, and 1440w for all three browsers.
